title: Author lib-level test coverage for md lint (SwiftMDLint) in tests/md-core-tests/
description: md lint audit subcommand was absorbed from the legacy swift-md-lint-cli package (deleted during Phase 2 consolidation 2026-05-31). The legacy package's tests, if any, were not migrated. Currently zero test coverage in tests/md-core-tests/ for SwiftMDLint (MDLint.swift, TypingPracticeInputNormalizer.swift). md.qa-evidence-packet.json marks this as smoke-tested-only with a futureFollowOnBead pointing here. Resolution: add tests/md-core-tests/MDLintTests.swift covering the lint rules (typing-practice violations, normalizer edge cases, --scope filtering, --fail-on-unsupported behavior); add tests/md-core-tests/TypingPracticeInputNormalizerTests.swift covering normalization invariants (idempotence, character-class equivalence). Pairs with [[bead:md-formatter-lib-test-coverage]] (sibling absorption gap).
closedNote: Test files recovered via git show from parent of Phase 2 absorption deletion commit (0c495a23) and ported to tests/md-core-tests/. 66 total tests passing. qa-evidence-packet coverageMap updated to coverageStatus: covered.
